title: ericameria suffruticosa
intro: Ericameria suffruticosa, also known as the bush sunflower, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, terpenes, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ericameria suffruticosa include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Ericameria suffruticosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
